purpose: Materialize the projected Node facade for Telemetry Observer as a thin resolver doorway.

requiredOperations.purpose: Resolve the projection manifest and executable SEJ before materialization.
Write the projected Node facade exactly as declared.
Compute the materialized facade hash from disk.
Emit node projection receipt for the materialized facade.

receiptShape.completionPosture: Telemetry Observer facade is a generated thin resolver doorway and owns no product truth.

completionPosture: Telemetry Observer Node facade is materialized only when the resolver writes generated/telemetry/node/telemetry-observer.cjs and emits evidence/telemetry/telemetry-observer.node-projection.receipt.v1.json.
